nasb.text: When they had come into Samaria, Elisha said, “O Lord, open the eyes of these men, that they may see.” So the Lord opened their eyes and they saw; and behold, they were in the midst of Samaria.

esv.text: As soon as they entered Samaria, Elisha said, “O Lord, open the eyes of these men, that they may see.” So the Lord opened their eyes and they saw, and behold, they were in the midst of Samaria.

cnv.text: 他們進入撒瑪利亞的時候，以利沙就說：“耶和華啊！求你開這些人的眼睛，使他們能看見。”於是耶和華開了他們的眼睛，他們就看見了。看哪！他們竟是在撒瑪利亞城中。

ccb.text: 他们进城后，以利沙祷告：“耶和华啊，求你开他们的眼睛，让他们看见。”耶和华开了他们的眼睛，他们就看见了，发现自己在撒玛利亚城中。
